src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/PBCacheAp.general_idea: Replace deprecated allowedOrigins with allowedOriginPatterns to support wildcard origins in Spring WebFlux on Java 17.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/config/Ci.general_idea: Update CircuitBreakerConfig builder methods to match the newer Resilience4j API signatures.
src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/config/Ci.human_impl: Replaced ringBufferSizeInHalfOpenState/ClosedState with permittedNumberOfCallsInHalfOpenState and slidingWindow.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/repositor.general_idea: Update the import statement for the Retry class to reflect its new package location in Reactor Core 3.4+.
Refactor the retry policy construction to use the new fluent API introduced in Reactor Core 3.4, replacing the deprecated builder methods.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 11 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.1.6 to 2.6.7, which is required for Java 17 support.
Update maven-compiler-plugin to 3.10.1 to ensure compatibility with Java 17 compilation.
Update maven-surefire-plugin to 3.0.0-M6 to support running tests on Java 17.
Add explicit javax.validation-api dependency to resolve module system conflicts in Java 17.

.github/workflows/pr-java-ci.yml.general_idea: Update the CI matrix to target Java 17 instead of Java 11 to align with the migration goal.
